forecast.miss_summary: No category forecast was written in-game; this reconstruction shows the implicit line underestimated John's final card VP by 21 and did not model the Generation 14 Terraforming Ganymede/Jovian/animal burst.

key_turning_points.title: Continued the outscale thesis after John's science, titanium, and Jovian package was visibly live
Continued broad infrastructure without a written card-VP plus city-VP forecast
Pivoted to hard close only after John's scalable scoring engine was mature
Maxed oxygen and oceans but lacked the prebuilt temperature capacity to prevent Generation 14

counterfactuals.change: Treat the Mars University/Research Outpost plus Io/Callisto/Shuttles package as a hard-close alarm by Generation 8-9
Build a second city anchor and reserve more greeneries for city adjacency instead of relying on the single city at space 18
Require a scalable card-VP lane by Generation 7 and reject the outscale call if none is available
Script enough temperature capacity before Generation 13 to finish all remaining global steps in the same generation

rule_updates: If an outscale call cannot show a plausible advantage in projected card VP plus city VP by Generation 6, then revoke it and switch to hard close or a named scoring lane.
If John has card cycling plus two major discount or Jovian-production pieces by Generation 8, then calculate the fastest closure line and treat generic setup actions as suspect.
If only one city anchor exists by Generation 7 and its adjacency ring is nearly full, then establish a second city or stop valuing future greeneries as city-multiplied points.
If the game can end within two generations, then assign a funded action or card to every remaining global step before spending on direct VP.
If a mutating MCP call times out while waiting for the opponent, then inspect state before retrying because the mutation may already be committed.

active_hypotheses.hypothesis: Earlier explicit macro calls reduce hybrid drift and improve late conversion quality.
active_hypotheses.result: A macro label existed, but it lacked a category forecast and failed to constrain play until the Generation 12 pivot.

active_hypotheses.hypothesis: Early city anchors can offset or prevent a card-VP deficit.
active_hypotheses.result: Only one city anchor was established; Codex lost city VP 5-11 and card VP 24-63.

active_hypotheses.hypothesis: Continuing actions after terraforming completion materially changes outcomes.
active_hypotheses.result: Codex correctly continued and added multiple card and board VP after Mars was complete, avoiding a repeat pass error.

endgame_review.best_missed_conversion: No profitable final conversion was clearly missed; the decisive miss was failing to build earlier closure capacity and a competitive scoring ceiling.

tool_mismatches.expected: Submit the nested project-card option with the live server's full payment object.
tool_mismatches.actual: The nested helper failed while an explicit outer-or submit_raw_entity payload with lowercase megacredits worked.
tool_mismatches.mitigation: Use the strict raw payload until the typed helper passes both unit tests and a live smoke test.

tool_mismatches.expected: Commit the greenery placement and return when the next prompt was available.
tool_mismatches.actual: The placement committed but the call waited on John's turn and timed out after 600 seconds.
tool_mismatches.mitigation: After a timeout, inspect game age and board state before retrying any mutation.
